CustomField.description: Formula used to calculate the risk level based on the Property RAG.
CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT( Property_RAG__c ) = 'Red', 'Severe: Immediate risk to the fabric of the building, and, or, the health of the occupant.', IF( TEXT( Property_RAG__c ) = 'Amber-Red', 'High: Non-immediate risk to the fabric of the building and, or, the health of the occupant.', IF( TEXT( Property_RAG__c ) = 'Amber', 'Medium: Risk of the measure failing and, or, risk of measure not performing as intended due to installation and, or, design.', IF( TEXT( Property_RAG__c ) = 'Amber-Green', 'Low: Cosmetic or snagging issues that do not affect the performance of the measure, occupant health or building health.', IF( TEXT( Property_RAG__c ) = 'Green', 'No risk: No issues observed and, or, all remediation addressed, and documents uploaded align to TM data warehouse', 'N/A: cancelled/discontinued' ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Property Risk Level
